name: B & B Transportation Inc
districts_or_customers: Private schools incl. St. Lukes, Foote School, Hopkins School, King School, Notre Dame Prep; CT public/private contracts from Bethany and East Haven yards
recent_news: Opened second bus yard in East Haven, CT in 2021; corporate office built in Bethany in 2013; founder Elizabeth Cohen listed as retired with Brad Cohen now President - potential succession dynamic.
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in: founder-led, family-owned CT operator ~150 buses/190 employees with multi-yard footprint and private-school niche; founder retirement plus son-led transition signals possible exit window. CT is a Summit/National Express core state.

East Ramapo / Rockland market is fragmented with many sub-scale Orthodox-community contractors; could be a tuck-in if part of a roll-up of Spring Valley operators, but standalone size (~32 employees) is sub-scale. Confirm NYSDOT 19-A status and fleet before pursuing.
